15.reason: [Error: No check for stack overflow. When i reaches 100, pushing another element will write beyond array bounds, causing undefined behavior. Should check if i < 100 before pushing.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: No check for stack overflow. When i reaches 100, pushing another element will write beyond array bounds, causing undefined behavior. Should check if i < 100 before pushing.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: No check for stack overflow. When i reaches 100, pushing another element will write beyond array bounds, causing undefined behavior. Should check if i < 100 before pushing.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  缺少栈满检查，当i==100时应输出"error"而不压入栈
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  No check for stack full (i == 100); should output "error " and not push when full.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Missing check for stack full condition (i == 100). Pushing when full causes array out-of-bounds and should output "error ".
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Missing check for stack full (i==100), causing array out-of-bounds and failing to output "error " when full.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Missing check for stack overflow: pushing when stack is full (i == 100) should output "error ", but code pushes unconditionally]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [No check for stack overflow; pushing when stack is full (i == 100) leads to buffer overflow]

17.reason: [Error: This branch handles a==0 (pop) but also incorrectly handles a==-1 (end of operations). When a==-1, it will attempt to pop from the stack, which is wrong. Should check for a==0 specifically before popping.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: This branch handles a==0 (pop) but also incorrectly handles a==-1 (end of operations). When a==-1, it will attempt to pop from the stack, which is wrong. Should check for a==0 specifically before popping.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: This branch handles both pop (a==0 when i>0) and end-of-input (a==-1). When a==-1, it incorrectly tries to pop from the stack, which is not the intended behavior. Should only pop when a==0 and i>0, and break or handle -1 separately.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  当i==0时访问越界，应检查栈非空
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Incorrectly handles -1 (end of operations) as a pop operation; should break or ignore -1.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Missing check for valid pop operation: when a != 0 and a != 1 (e.g., -1), this else block executes incorrectly. Also, no handling for -1 to terminate loop early, causing -1 to be treated as pop]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [No check for invalid operation code; non-0, non-1 inputs (like -1) are treated as pop operations]

16.reason: 此分支错误地处理了输入中的-1（结束标志），且未检查栈空导致访问越界

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  此分支错误地处理了输入中的-1（结束标志），且未检查栈空导致访问越界
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  This else incorrectly handles cases other than 0 and 1, including termination -1; should only handle pop (a == 0 with i > 0) and break on -1.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Incorrectly catches -1 and any other input, treating them as pop operations. Should explicitly handle a==0 for pop and break on a==-1.

10.reason: Missing check for termination -1; loop should break when a == -1.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Missing check for termination -1; loop should break when a == -1.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Does not check for the termination condition -1, causing the loop to process -1 as a pop operation instead of stopping.

18.reason: Incorrectly decrements stack pointer when a==-1, modifying state after termination signal.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Incorrectly decrements stack pointer when a==-1, modifying state after termination signal.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Popping when stack is empty (i == 0) is not checked here because the only empty check is for a == 0; but if a is -1 and i == 0, this causes underflow]
